title: Operating-system discovery with WMIC

rule_origin.reference: queries/retrieval_spec.md (Q1/main-alert analytic); executable form formalised under alert-anchor policy v1.0

scope.description: All events for the pre-declared ar-win-2 asset in the multi-host source log.

selection.justification: The source contains periodic inventory cycles; the latest matching version query anchors the final complete cycle retained by the case.

rationale: WMIC querying the operating-system version is a behavioural system-discovery rule; its parent context is not used to force the trigger.
